author_rating_explanation: Both focus authors are affiliated with The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shenzhen (CUHK-Shenzhen). Per the scoring rules, CUHK-Shenzhen is distinct from CUHK Hong Kong and must not receive the top-school boost. Without explicit metadata confirming it as a top-tier campus, it falls into the 5-6 mid-tier range.
